---
name: Security
about: STOP — please don't file public issues for security bugs
labels: security
---

## Don't file this issue

For security-relevant bugs (memory safety, supply-chain, parser/DoS issues on
untrusted input, information disclosure), use **GitHub's private vulnerability
reporting** instead:

https://github.com/adamson34/zonewarden/security/advisories/new

See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for what counts as in-scope.

If your issue is *not* security-relevant (false positives in verdicts, feature
requests, etc.), close this issue and use the bug or feature template instead.
